seoTitle: Catalina vs Cathcart — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Catalina and Cathcart. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Catalina and Cathcart.
heading: Catalina vs Cathcart — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Catalina, New South Wales and Cathcart, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cathcart has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Catalina (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Catalina or Cathcart safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Catalina has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Cathcart scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Catalina scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Cathcart scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Catalina or Cathcart?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cathcart has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
